events.text: Goal! Costa Rica 0, Germany 1. Serge Gnabry (Germany) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by David Raum with a cross.
Goal! Costa Rica 1, Germany 1. Yeltsin Tejeda (Costa Rica) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Costa Rica 2, Germany 1. Juan Vargas (Costa Rica) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner following a set piece situation.
Goal! Costa Rica 2, Germany 2. Kai Havertz (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Niclas Füllkrug.
Óscar Duarte (Costa Rica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Costa Rica 2, Germany 3. Kai Havertz (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Serge Gnabry with a cross.
Goal! Costa Rica 2, Germany 4. Niclas Füllkrug (Germany) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Leroy Sané.Goal awarded following VAR Review.
